author: Manex
description: Local AI brain for your Obsidian vault. Indexes all your notes and answers questions privately using a local Apple Silicon MLX model — no cloud, no API keys. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Manex
manifest.description: Local AI brain for your vault. Indexes all your notes and answers questions privately using a local Apple Silicon MLX model — no cloud, no API keys.
manifest.name: Manex Brain

name: Manex Brain

releases.author: krcnow
releases.description:
Initial public release of Manex Brain.

- Local AI brain for your vault using Apple Silicon MLX (Qwen3-4B-4bit)
- Indexes all notes in the background for vault-wide semantic search
- Active note is automatically used as context for every question
- Graph-aware: linked notes, backlinks, and shared-tag notes included
- Clickable note links in answers open the note directly
- No cloud, no API keys — all inference runs on-device
- Automatically installs mlx-lm and starts the local server on first load
